---
title: "01 Baseline Analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Baseline Analysis

**Summary**: read in V1, V2, and V3 of the Washington State EHD map and calculate a Population Burden Gap (PBG) for people of color for each version. Then, calculate a ΔPBG between V1 and V2, and V2 and V3. This is the native PBG and ΔPBG calculation our sensitivty analysis PBG and ΔPBG values will be compared to.

```{r}
#Read functions
source("../R/helpers.R")
source("../R/compute_pbg.R")
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#Read Libraries
load_packages(c("tidyverse", "sf", "arcgislayers", "tidyverse"))
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Load EHD map data and attach ACS population weights for each version
EHDv1 <- pull_EHD_data("EHDV1", "ACS_2017")
EHDv2 <- pull_EHD_data("EHDV2", "ACS_2019")
EHDv3 <- pull_EHD_data("EHDV3", "ACS_2023")
```

```{r}
#Calculate PBG
EHDv1_PBG <- compute_pbg_components(
  EHDv1,
  People_of_Color,
  Total_Population, 
  Environmental_Health_Disparites)

EHDv2_PBG <- compute_pbg_components(
  EHDv2,
  People_of_Color,
  Total_Population, 
  Environmental_Health_Disparitie)

EHDv3_PBG <- compute_pbg_components(
  EHDv3,
  People_of_Color,
  Total_Population, 
  Cumulative_EHD_Rank)
```

```{r}
#Calculate ΔPBG
```

```{r}
#Data Table + Chart
```
